signal_logic.trigger: Calculate daily sentiment scores per ticker from r/investing posts/comments. Compute rolling 3-day standard deviation (volatility) of sentiment scores. Signal triggers when volatility spikes above the 90th percentile of historical volatility for that ticker.

entry_exit.entry: Enter long if volatility spike occurs and average sentiment score that day is negative (contrarian long). Enter short if volatility spike occurs and average sentiment score is positive (contrarian short).
entry_exit.exit: Exit positions when sentiment volatility drops below the 50th percentile or after 5 trading days.

position_sizing.adjustment: Reduce position size by half if average daily volume is below 1 million shares.
